emotional_tone: Warm, appetizing, encouraging, low-friction, and tactile.

global_rules.mobile_first: Design specifically for mobile viewports (use max-w-md mx-auto if rendering on desktop web).
global_rules.accessibility: Ensure text contrast (APCA compliant), hit targets >= 44px, respect prefers-reduced-motion.
global_rules.data_testid: MANDATORY: Add data-testid attribute to all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, toggles, chips).

typography.strategy: High-end health app. Break standard SaaS look. Avoid Inter.

spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for main containers and screen padding.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-3xl for main bento cards, rounded-full for chips/buttons. No sharp corners.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Bento layout for dashboard widgets. Flexbox with gap-4 for vertical lists.

components.buttons: Shadcn based but fully customized. Full width for primary actions. rounded-full, h-14 for mobile fat finger rule.
components.cards: Soft-surface approach with 1px subtle borders (border-[#EBE8E0]). Background #FFFFFF.
components.chips: Used for filters (Countries, Cooking Methods, Carbs, Protein). rounded-full border border-[#EBE8E0] px-4 py-2 text-sm. Active state: bg-[#3D405B] text-white border-[#3D405B].
components.forms: Large touch targets. Shadcn inputs with h-14, rounded-2xl. No generic HTML inputs.
components.bottom_nav: Fixed bottom, glassmorphism backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80, 1px top border. Saturate 150%.

screens.onboarding: One question per screen flow. Large typography, minimal cognitive load. Easy tap choices for dietary prefs. No dense forms.
screens.home_dashboard: Greeting + Today's Calorie summary widget (bento style, clearly showing consumed vs remaining). Massive 'Randomize Meal' primary CTA button. List of today's selected meals.
screens.meal_result_card: Hero image max-h-[45vh] covering top of screen, bottom gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-[#FDFBF7] via-[#FDFBF7]/80 to-transparent) to blend into content. Large meal name, calories big and bold, keyword chips underneath. 'Re-roll' secondary button, 'Add to Today' primary button.
screens.keyword_filter: Full-screen or bottom sheet with grouped, horizontally wrapping chip selections.
screens.profile: Clean list of editable body stats, preferences, allergies, and the Purpose toggle (Random vs Diet).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hover states must lift (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow slightly.
motion_and_interactions.tap_states: Scale down slightly (active:scale-95) to feel tactile.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Smooth fade and slide-up for mobile feel.

meal_images.description: Healthy Thai food bowl (cucumber and salmon)

backgrounds.description: Appetizing soft texture for onboarding background overlay (use at low opacity like 5-10%)

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST build this as a mobile-first web app view (max-w-md mx-auto, min-h-screen, mobile bottom nav) mimicking a React Native app but using React JS, Tailwind, and Shadcn UI.
Do NOT use .tsx files. Use .js and .jsx exclusively as requested.
Inject the 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' fonts via Google Fonts in index.html and configure Tailwind to use them.
Do not use generic clinical blue or teal. Stick strictly to the warm Organic & Earthy palette defined in colors.
Ensure every interactive element (button, link, toggle, chip, input) has a distinct data-testid.
On the Home Screen, make the Calorie Summary visually prominent, clearly showing the 400 calorie subtraction if 'Diet' mode is selected.
For the Filter Keyword Screen, ensure the chips are highly tactile with clear visual distinction between selected and unselected states.
Avoid Shadcn's default Vercel-like square aesthetics. Override Card and Button border radii to rounded-3xl and rounded-full respectively.
Meal images must not be stretched. Use object-cover and mask the bottom of hero images smoothly into the app background.
